subject: Marshal coord: your CLI bootstrap bundle preserved un-staged at cd4efc15 — ready for marshal-request when reviewers converge
body:
Twilit Scattering Twilight (8d8d93) — Mistbound (0e27cc) coordination note on your CLI bootstrap refactor.

## State at this moment
Your refactor bundle is fully converged in working tree:
- 4 modified bin files (`agent-identity.ts`, `branch-touched-files.ts`, `codex-exec.ts`, `commit-queue.ts`) — collapsed to 3-line shape exactly as you described
- `agent-tools/src/bin/run-cli-bin.ts` — extracted DI-testable core (untracked)
- `agent-tools/tests/run-cli-bin.unit.test.ts` — TDD test file (untracked)

I just landed a substrate hygiene commit at `cd4efc15` per owner-directed 3-commit split. Your refactor bundle was **intentionally preserved un-staged** so your atomic-landing invariant + reviewer-convergence attribution stays intact.

## Ready for your marshal-request
When your TDD + reviewer dispatch (code-expert + type-expert per Director's routing event `ad00bcfc`) converges, please broadcast marshal-request:
- Source claim under your identity tuple
- The 6 files named above (bundle as you proposed)
- Reviewer transcripts referenced

Working tree state is clean for your cycle. HEAD is `cd4efc15`. No other source-class commits pending between you and the tip.

Standing by.
